services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end design solutions — from the first idea to the key in your hand

architectural.name: Architectural Design
architectural.desc: Architectural design is the soul of a project before it has a body. We begin with site analysis and end with a complete set of precise construction documents — every drawing reflecting your project's identity.
architectural.details: We deliver concept sketches and design narrative, full architectural drawing sets, construction documents for permits and execution, and complete coordination with structural, electrical, and MEP engineers.

interior.name: Interior Design
interior.desc: Interiors are where people truly live — which makes interior design both an aesthetic and a deeply human responsibility. Every corner tells a story, every detail has meaning.
interior.details: We design space layouts and furniture arrangements, select colors, materials, and fabrics, design lighting and ceiling systems, plan built-in cabinetry, and supervise execution down to the last decorative detail.

exterior.name: Exterior & Landscape Design
exterior.desc: A building's exterior is its introduction to the world, and its landscape is the natural extension of those who inhabit it. We design facades that stand apart and gardens that speak of their owners.
exterior.details: Full architectural facade design, garden and pool design, water features, exterior lighting design, and selection of exterior materials compatible with climate and context.

supervision.name: Construction Supervision
supervision.desc: An exceptional design is only complete when the execution matches its ambition. We ensure that what was drawn on paper is built with the same care and precision it deserves.
supervision.details: Regular site visits, quality control of materials and workmanship, contractor and supplier coordination, financial claim reviews, and periodic progress reports for the client.

rendering.name: 3D Visualization
rendering.desc: Never build what you cannot see first. We produce photorealistic 3D visuals that give you a complete, immersive experience of your project — with full freedom to revise before anything is built.
rendering.details: Photorealistic still renders, interactive virtual walkthroughs, natural and artificial lighting simulation, color and material testing, and marketing animations for larger projects.

consulting.name: Architectural Consultancy
consulting.desc: Sometimes you don't need a full project — you need the right expert opinion at the right moment. One hour with an expert can save months of costly mistakes.
consulting.details: Pre-purchase property feasibility, drawing review and error auditing, facade assessment and improvement recommendations, renovation and expansion consultancy, and technical tender specifications.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A journey of architectural passion toward excellence and innovation — since 2009
about.bio_text: Sardini Studio is an architectural design practice founded in Aleppo in 2009 by architect Bilal Sardini, built on a single conviction: every building is a poem written in space, and every interior is an invitation to transform stone and concrete into a deeply human experience.
about.philosophy_text: Over fifteen years, we have delivered more than 150 projects across Syria, the Gulf, and beyond — from luxury private villas and residential complexes to commercial centers and boutique hotels. Our philosophy is straightforward: true design is not measured by complexity, but by how honestly it speaks to the people who live within it. We unite contemporary aesthetics with authentic Arabic identity, and we begin every project the same way — by listening.
about.quote: What sets Sardini Studio apart is not just what you see in the photographs — it's what you feel when you walk through the door.
about.value_1_text: Every project begins with a deep understanding of the person who will live in it — not the measurements.
about.value_2_text: Small details make the biggest difference. Nothing is left to chance.
about.value_3_text: Our relationship with every client is built on complete clarity about costs, timelines, and expectations.
about.value_4_text: We prefer fewer projects of higher quality over many projects of average quality.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A clear and transparent methodology — from the first meeting to the moment you hold the key

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.desc: We begin with an open conversation where we listen to your vision, understand your needs, and assess possibilities — with no obligation. This meeting is always free.

step2.title: Site Study & Analysis
step2.desc: We visit the site, analyze its engineering, environmental, and regulatory conditions, and establish the foundational architectural brief.

step3.title: Concept Design
step3.desc: We present two to three distinct design directions — each with its own character — so you can choose the one that truly speaks to you.

step4.title: Design Development
step4.desc: Once the concept is chosen, we develop it across all technical and aesthetic dimensions and complete the full drawing set.

step5.title: 3D Visualization
step5.desc: We produce photorealistic 3D renders that show you exactly how the project will look — before a single wall is built.

step6.title: Execution & Follow-up
step6.desc: We supervise construction and follow every stage to ensure each detail is delivered with the precision and quality it deserves.
